collectiondata.overview:
Best India to Mauritius Tour Package – Escape to Island Bliss

Step into Mauritius, an island where turquoise lagoons meet lush sugarcane fields, and a vibrant mix of cultures creates a paradise of colors, flavors, and experiences. The Best India to Mauritius Tour Package begins with this fusion of beach luxury and cultural discovery. With Travelxploria, your Best Travel Agency and trusted Best International Tour Operator, explore Mauritius through expertly crafted tour packages designed for family tour packages, honeymoon packages, and adventure tour packages alike.
From curated resort stays like LUX* Belle Mare to sunset dinners at Paradise Cove, our itineraries bring you the finest blend of relaxation and discovery.

Why Choose a Mauritius Tour Package from India?

Visa-Free Entry for Indian Passport Holders
Indian travelers can enjoy hassle-free entry as Mauritius offers visa-free access, making the India to Mauritius Tour Package a convenient and attractive choice.

White Sand Beaches, Luxury Resorts & Multicultural Charm
From postcard-perfect beaches to five-star resorts like Shanti Maurice or Long Beach Resort, the Mauritius tour package from India immerses travelers in a world of tropical elegance and rich Creole heritage.

Ideal for Honeymooners, Families, and Adventure Seekers
Whether booking a Mauritius tour package from Bangalore for a family tour packages getaway or planning a honeymoon retreat from Chennai, Mauritius suits every traveler’s taste. Travelxploria ensures the perfect blend of adventure tour packages, wellness, and romance.

Top India to Mauritius Tour Packages

5 to 7 Days Mauritius Tour Package – North & South Island Highlights
Experience both regions with our North Island tour Mauritius itinerary, visiting Grand Baie, Chamarel, Port Louis, and Black River Gorges in a balanced tropical escape. Add-ons include dolphin watching, rum tasting at local distilleries, and kayaking through mangroves.

Mauritius Honeymoon Packages from India
Our romantic honeymoon packages for the India to Mauritius Tour Package include couple’s spa treatments, sunset dinners, and serene beach stays curated for newlyweds. Choose from glass-bottom boat rides, private island picnics, or luxury villa accommodations.

Budget Mauritius Holiday Packages for Indian Tourists
Our budget options for the India to Mauritius Tour Package from Kolkata and Mumbai offer great value without compromising on beaches, culture, or hospitality. Travel during shoulder seasons or book early for discounts.

Customized Mauritius Itineraries for Families and Groups
Families can enjoy dolphin watching, nature hikes, and cultural tours—all part of our customizable family tour packages for Mauritius. Options include kids’ activity zones, underwater walk experiences, and plantation visits.

Must-Visit Places in Mauritius Covered in Tour Packages

Grand Baie – Beaches, Water Sports & Nightlife
A northern coastal gem where vibrant nightlife, shopping, and water sports are bundled into every India to Mauritius Tour Package.

Port Louis – Capital City, Local Markets & Fort Adelaide
Explore colonial-era architecture, bustling bazaars, and panoramic views from Fort Adelaide. Visit the Central Market for local handicrafts and street food tastings.

Chamarel – Seven Colored Earths & Waterfalls
Marvel at this geological phenomenon and the island’s most scenic waterfalls—part of our North Island tour Mauritius. Add a stop at the Chamarel Rum Distillery.

Ile Aux Cerfs – Lagoon Island for Snorkeling & Parasailing
Catamaran cruises, coral reef snorkeling, and beach barbecues make this a must-see for travelers on any India to Mauritius Tour Package.

Black River Gorges National Park – Nature Trails and Scenic Views
Hike through this lush sanctuary of endemic wildlife and tropical flora. Don’t miss Macchabée Trail or Alexandra Falls viewpoint.

What’s Included in the Best India to Mauritius Tour Packages?

Round-Trip Flights from Major Indian Cities
All-inclusive packages cover flights from Mumbai, Kolkata, Chennai, and Bangalore with top airlines such as Emirates or Air Mauritius.

Hotel or Beach Resort Accommodation with Meals
Stay in premium beachfront resorts or boutique hotels with full-board meal options. Upgrade to ocean-view suites or all-inclusive plans.

Airport Transfers, Island Tours & Sightseeing Activities
Enjoy comfortable transfers and expertly guided island tours. All transportation is air-conditioned and accompanied by local English-speaking guides.

Optional Add-ons: Water Sports, Spa Sessions, and Cruises
Enhance your India to Mauritius Tour Package with dolphin watching, catamaran sunset cruises, or spa and wellness experiences such as Mauritian bamboo massage.

Best Time to Visit Mauritius from India

May to December – Cool, Dry and Pleasant
Ideal for beach activities and sightseeing. Expect calm seas and vibrant festivals like Diwali and Kreol Festival.

January to April – Warm Weather with Tropical Showers
Perfect for travelers seeking off-season discounts and lush greenery. Pack light rainwear for quick tropical showers.

Month-by-Month Travel Tips and Recommendations
From whale watching in July to Diwali festivities in October, each month offers unique experiences. February offers great deals and fewer crowds.

Frequently Asked Questions About Mauritius Tour Packages from India

Is a visa required for Indian citizens traveling to Mauritius?
No, Indian passport holders enjoy visa-free entry, making it easy to book the best India to Mauritius Tour Package.

How many days are ideal for a Mauritius trip from India?
A 5 to 7-day itinerary allows time to explore both the North and South Island highlights. Longer stays can include spa retreats or diving certifications.

What is the average cost of a Mauritius package from India?
India to Mauritius Tour Package price ranges from ₹80,000 to ₹1.6L depending on inclusions and accommodation type.

Which is the best India to Mauritius tour package for honeymooners?
Our honeymoon packages to Mauritius include romantic beach resorts, candlelit dinners, and spa experiences with couple’s massages and floating breakfasts.

Is there an India to Mauritius tour package with dolphin watching?
Yes, most of our India to Mauritius Tour Packages from Chennai, Mumbai, or Bangalore include dolphin spotting cruises in Tamarin Bay. Book early morning slots for best sightings.

Do you offer India to Mauritius tour package with spa and wellness experience?
Absolutely. We offer rejuvenating spa treatments in beach resorts like LUX* Grand Gaube and Anantara Iko, included in the best India to Mauritius Tour Package.

What’s included in a North Island tour Mauritius?
Beach visits to Grand Baie, cultural stops at Port Louis, and the scenic Chamarel are all part of our North Island tour Mauritius. Optional rum tasting and parasailing can be added.

How to Book the Best Mauritius Tour Package from India

Trusted Indian Travel Agencies and Online Platforms
Book with Travelxploria or other top-rated platforms offering India to Mauritius Tour Package from Chennai, Mumbai, or Kolkata. Check reviews and compare inclusions.

Booking Tips for Honeymooners and Families
Look for early bird discounts, and confirm resort inclusions like spa, candlelight dinners, or kids’ clubs. Request ocean-view upgrades where available.

Documents to Carry and Travel Insurance Info
Carry valid passport, return flight tickets, hotel vouchers, and travel insurance for smooth entry. Print visa-free documentation details for reference.
From pristine beaches and coral reefs to sacred lakes and culinary delights, the Best India to Mauritius Tour Package offers unforgettable experiences for every kind of traveler. Whether it’s a Mauritius tour package from Bangalore for adventure tour packages, a romantic escape from Chennai, or a cultural retreat from Kolkata—Travelxploria curates your island dreams with care and expertise.

packages.overview:
• An inspired island retreat where mind, body and spirit rejoice, JW Marriott Mauritius Resort is set against the dramatic backdrop of UNESCO World Heritage Site, Le Morne Brabant Mountain.
  • Located on the spectacular Le Morne Peninsula, this luxury resort benefits from an exceptional coastal position, with endless views across white sands, protected coral reefs and the sparkling Indian Ocean.
  • A haven for leisure, our immersive quality inspires rest and relaxation. Combining Mauritian grace and modern comfort, 169 suites offer calm sanctuary, some with direct beach access and lagoon vistas. Fostering connection, there is a rich array of activities and mindful experiences to suit all generations.
  • The island’s culinary tradition is reflected at the five dining venues, where the choice ranges from local cuisine to world-class Indian, Japanese and Pan Asian options. The resort intentionally guides you to reconnect with the natural world.

Start your day with a hearty breakfast at a scenic spot, soaking in breathtaking ocean views in your accommodation. After that our friendly Travelxploria representative welcomes you at your hotel for a comfortable pick-up, to explore the Mauritius' wild and scenic South. Next, venture to the sacred Grand Bassin (Ganga Talao), where the towering statue of Lord Shiva stands in serene beauty. Next, drive through the lush landscapes of Black River Gorges National Park, a paradise of waterfalls and rare wildlife. Marvel at the surreal Chamarel Seven Colored Earth, where nature paints the ground in stunning hues, and witness the powerful Chamarel Waterfall cascading into the jungle. Feel the energy of La Vallée des Couleurs, where thrilling activities like quad biking and ziplining await. As the day winds down, your guide ensures a smooth drop-off back to your hotel, leaving you with the soulful essence of untouched beauty.

Rise and shine with our representative from Travelxploria will greet you for a seamless pick-up in a private vehicle as you embark on an unforgettable North Island tour. Start your day with a delightful breakfast in hotel sipping fresh tropical juices while the waves set the perfect vibe. With your expert guide, explore the vibrant capital Port Louis, wandering through the historic Aapravasi Ghat and the lively Central Market, where spices and souvenirs fill the air with exotic aromas. Stroll along the Caudan Waterfront, indulging in boutique shopping and scenic harbor views. Next, marvel at the serene beauty of Pamplemousses Botanical Garden, home to giant water lilies and rare plant species. After a delicious Mauritian lunch (optional), continue to Grand Baie, the island’s lively coastal town, perfect for a relaxing beach walk or some retail therapy. As the sun begins to set, your guide ensures a smooth drop-off back to your hotel, leaving you with unforgettable memories of Mauritius.

packages.overview:
• Born in an era of glamorous travel, Le Méridien believes everyone should explore the world in style. Le Méridien Île Maurice effortlessly blends style and relaxation, offering a vibrant oasis for families with 261 elegantly appointed rooms stretching along the beach.
  • Here, every age is catered to with thoughtful, immersive experiences. Younger guests are invited to explore and connect with new friends from around the world in a playful environment, while parents enjoy exclusive spaces designed for peace and quiet.
  • Family bonds are nurtured through curated activities and screen-free, digital detox programs that encourage shared moments of connection. Authentic culinary journeys and cultural discoveries further immerse families in the island’s rich heritage, offering a deeper connection to Mauritius.
  • Here, we help families disconnect from the everyday, only to reconnect with each other, crafting sophisticated, unforgettable memories that will echo long after the vacation ends.

packages.overview:
• The island of Mauritius was uninhabited before its first recorded visit by Arab sailors in the end of the 10th century. Its name Dina Arobi has been associated with Arab sailors who first discovered the island.
  • Mauritius Island is relatively young geologically, having been created by volcanic activity some 8 million years ago. Together with Saint Brandon, Réunion, and Rodrigues, the island is part of the Mascarene Islands.
  • Lagoon Attitude has also an idyllic location for windsurfing and kitesurfing in Mauritius. Its typical Mauritian architecture and natural decoration offer a peaceful Mauritian stay.

Start your day with a hearty breakfast at a scenic spot, soaking in breathtaking ocean views in your accommodation. After that our friendly Travelxploria representative welcomes you at your hotel for a comfortable pick-up, to explore the Mauritius' wild and scenic South. Next, venture to the sacred Grand Bassin (Ganga Talao), where the towering statue of Lord Shiva stands in serene beauty. Next, drive through the lush landscapes of Black River Gorges National Park, a paradise of waterfalls and rare wildlife. Marvel at the surreal Chamarel Seven Colored Earth, where nature paints the ground in stunning hues, and witness the powerful Chamarel Waterfall cascading into the jungle. Feel the energy of La Vallée des Couleurs, where thrilling activities like quad biking and ziplining await. As the day winds down, your guide ensures a smooth drop-off back to your hotel, leaving you with the soulful essence of untouched beauty.

Rise and shine with our representative from Travelxploria will greet you for a seamless pick-up in a private vehicle as you embark on an unforgettable North Island tour. Start your day with a delightful breakfast in hotel sipping fresh tropical juices while the waves set the perfect vibe. With your expert guide, explore the vibrant capital Port Louis, wandering through the historic Aapravasi Ghat and the lively Central Market, where spices and souvenirs fill the air with exotic aromas. Stroll along the Caudan Waterfront, indulging in boutique shopping and scenic harbor views. Next, marvel at the serene beauty of Pamplemousses Botanical Garden, home to giant water lilies and rare plant species. After a delicious Mauritian lunch (optional), continue to Grand Baie, the island’s lively coastal town, perfect for a relaxing beach walk or some retail therapy. As the sun begins to set, your guide ensures a smooth drop-off back to your hotel, leaving you with unforgettable memories of Mauritius.

• Located on the south coast of Mauritius in the nature reserve of Bel Ombre
  • Classic plantation-style architecture showcasing the island's heritage for an immersive travel experience

  • Partnered with Reef Conservation in their inclusive and holistic conservation initiatives for the wider Bel Ombre and South West Coast communities

packages.package_name: Radisson Blu Poste Lafayette Resort & Spa
packages.overview:
• Located on an island in the Indian Ocean, the Radisson Blu Poste Lafayette Resort & Spa, Mauritius is an adult-only resort offering a serene tropical getaway on Mauritius's eastern shores. Experience stunning ocean views, beach activities, and nearby attractions like Grand Bay and Flacq Market. Our 4-star resort features comfortable rooms with modern amenities, including two on-site restaurants, a spa, a pool, and a stylish conference room with picturesque views, ideal for intimate meetings of up to 16 attendees.
  • Experience comfort at Radisson Blu Poste Lafayette Resort & Spa, Mauritius, an exclusive adults-only haven. Delight in a unique culinary adventure at one of our onsite dining options, rejuvenate your senses at our serene on-site spa, and stay active at our state-of-the-art fitness center.
  • Bask in the sun by our pristine pool, or explore the stunning surroundings with our convenient bike rental service. Enjoy the added comforts of concierge assistance, free Wi-Fi, and 24-hour room service, for an unforgettable stay.

packages.overview:
• Located in the Indian Ocean, Mauritius is renowned for its white-sand beaches, turquoise lagoons, and coral reefs — making it a top destination for relaxation and water activities.

  • The island offers a rich cultural blend of Indian, French, Creole, Chinese, and African influences, reflected in its cuisine, festivals, and everyday life.

  • Beyond its beaches, Mauritius boasts lush green mountains, scenic waterfalls, nature parks, and adventure activities like hiking, snorkeling, dolphin watching, and more.

packages.overview:
• Part of Mauritius’s undeveloped east coast, 3*+ Friday Attitude hotel is nestled in the peaceful fishing village of Trou d’Eau Douce. It has a deeply relaxing atmosphere that’s ideal for a holiday with your family, friends or partner.
  • Come for the salty smell of the Indian Ocean, and the typically blue tropical sky. And come to enjoy a magnificent fine-sand beach, and to indulge in simply doing nothing, swimming or watersports. Accompanying you throughout your stay, our Family Members will provide a welcome filled with Mauritius’ famous cheerfulness.
  • Throughout your holiday, expect zero stress. Instead, the forecast is for fun and relaxation– because, here, it's Friday every day!

{"title":"Shane A Dsouza","rating":"5","publishDate":"2025-03-04","publishBy":"","subItems":[{"type":"text","content":"

it was an excellent trip to Vietnam very well coordinated by Bikram and team. overview:
Best India to Mauritius Tour Package – Escape to Island Bliss

Step into Mauritius, an island where turquoise lagoons meet lush sugarcane fields, and a vibrant mix of cultures creates a paradise of colors, flavors, and experiences. The Best India to Mauritius Tour Package begins with this fusion of beach luxury and cultural discovery. With Travelxploria, your Best Travel Agency and trusted Best International Tour Operator, explore Mauritius through expertly crafted tour packages designed for family tour packages, honeymoon packages, and adventure tour packages alike.
From curated resort stays like LUX* Belle Mare to sunset dinners at Paradise Cove, our itineraries bring you the finest blend of relaxation and discovery.

Why Choose a Mauritius Tour Package from India?

Visa-Free Entry for Indian Passport Holders
Indian travelers can enjoy hassle-free entry as Mauritius offers visa-free access, making the India to Mauritius Tour Package a convenient and attractive choice.

White Sand Beaches, Luxury Resorts & Multicultural Charm
From postcard-perfect beaches to five-star resorts like Shanti Maurice or Long Beach Resort, the Mauritius tour package from India immerses travelers in a world of tropical elegance and rich Creole heritage.

Ideal for Honeymooners, Families, and Adventure Seekers
Whether booking a Mauritius tour package from Bangalore for a family tour packages getaway or planning a honeymoon retreat from Chennai, Mauritius suits every traveler’s taste. Travelxploria ensures the perfect blend of adventure tour packages, wellness, and romance.

Top India to Mauritius Tour Packages

5 to 7 Days Mauritius Tour Package – North & South Island Highlights
Experience both regions with our North Island tour Mauritius itinerary, visiting Grand Baie, Chamarel, Port Louis, and Black River Gorges in a balanced tropical escape. Add-ons include dolphin watching, rum tasting at local distilleries, and kayaking through mangroves.

Mauritius Honeymoon Packages from India
Our romantic honeymoon packages for the India to Mauritius Tour Package include couple’s spa treatments, sunset dinners, and serene beach stays curated for newlyweds. Choose from glass-bottom boat rides, private island picnics, or luxury villa accommodations.

Budget Mauritius Holiday Packages for Indian Tourists
Our budget options for the India to Mauritius Tour Package from Kolkata and Mumbai offer great value without compromising on beaches, culture, or hospitality. Travel during shoulder seasons or book early for discounts.

Customized Mauritius Itineraries for Families and Groups
Families can enjoy dolphin watching, nature hikes, and cultural tours—all part of our customizable family tour packages for Mauritius. Options include kids’ activity zones, underwater walk experiences, and plantation visits.

Must-Visit Places in Mauritius Covered in Tour Packages

Grand Baie – Beaches, Water Sports & Nightlife
A northern coastal gem where vibrant nightlife, shopping, and water sports are bundled into every India to Mauritius Tour Package.

Port Louis – Capital City, Local Markets & Fort Adelaide
Explore colonial-era architecture, bustling bazaars, and panoramic views from Fort Adelaide. Visit the Central Market for local handicrafts and street food tastings.

Chamarel – Seven Colored Earths & Waterfalls
Marvel at this geological phenomenon and the island’s most scenic waterfalls—part of our North Island tour Mauritius. Add a stop at the Chamarel Rum Distillery.

Ile Aux Cerfs – Lagoon Island for Snorkeling & Parasailing
Catamaran cruises, coral reef snorkeling, and beach barbecues make this a must-see for travelers on any India to Mauritius Tour Package.

Black River Gorges National Park – Nature Trails and Scenic Views
Hike through this lush sanctuary of endemic wildlife and tropical flora. Don’t miss Macchabée Trail or Alexandra Falls viewpoint.

What’s Included in the Best India to Mauritius Tour Packages?

Round-Trip Flights from Major Indian Cities
All-inclusive packages cover flights from Mumbai, Kolkata, Chennai, and Bangalore with top airlines such as Emirates or Air Mauritius.

Hotel or Beach Resort Accommodation with Meals
Stay in premium beachfront resorts or boutique hotels with full-board meal options. Upgrade to ocean-view suites or all-inclusive plans.

Airport Transfers, Island Tours & Sightseeing Activities
Enjoy comfortable transfers and expertly guided island tours. All transportation is air-conditioned and accompanied by local English-speaking guides.

Optional Add-ons: Water Sports, Spa Sessions, and Cruises
Enhance your India to Mauritius Tour Package with dolphin watching, catamaran sunset cruises, or spa and wellness experiences such as Mauritian bamboo massage.

Best Time to Visit Mauritius from India

May to December – Cool, Dry and Pleasant
Ideal for beach activities and sightseeing. Expect calm seas and vibrant festivals like Diwali and Kreol Festival.

January to April – Warm Weather with Tropical Showers
Perfect for travelers seeking off-season discounts and lush greenery. Pack light rainwear for quick tropical showers.

Month-by-Month Travel Tips and Recommendations
From whale watching in July to Diwali festivities in October, each month offers unique experiences. February offers great deals and fewer crowds.

Frequently Asked Questions About Mauritius Tour Packages from India

Is a visa required for Indian citizens traveling to Mauritius?
No, Indian passport holders enjoy visa-free entry, making it easy to book the best India to Mauritius Tour Package.

How many days are ideal for a Mauritius trip from India?
A 5 to 7-day itinerary allows time to explore both the North and South Island highlights. Longer stays can include spa retreats or diving certifications.

What is the average cost of a Mauritius package from India?
India to Mauritius Tour Package price ranges from ₹80,000 to ₹1.6L depending on inclusions and accommodation type.

Which is the best India to Mauritius tour package for honeymooners?
Our honeymoon packages to Mauritius include romantic beach resorts, candlelit dinners, and spa experiences with couple’s massages and floating breakfasts.

Is there an India to Mauritius tour package with dolphin watching?
Yes, most of our India to Mauritius Tour Packages from Chennai, Mumbai, or Bangalore include dolphin spotting cruises in Tamarin Bay. Book early morning slots for best sightings.

Do you offer India to Mauritius tour package with spa and wellness experience?
Absolutely. We offer rejuvenating spa treatments in beach resorts like LUX* Grand Gaube and Anantara Iko, included in the best India to Mauritius Tour Package.

What’s included in a North Island tour Mauritius?
Beach visits to Grand Baie, cultural stops at Port Louis, and the scenic Chamarel are all part of our North Island tour Mauritius. Optional rum tasting and parasailing can be added.

How to Book the Best Mauritius Tour Package from India

Trusted Indian Travel Agencies and Online Platforms
Book with Travelxploria or other top-rated platforms offering India to Mauritius Tour Package from Chennai, Mumbai, or Kolkata. Check reviews and compare inclusions.

Booking Tips for Honeymooners and Families
Look for early bird discounts, and confirm resort inclusions like spa, candlelight dinners, or kids’ clubs. Request ocean-view upgrades where available.

Documents to Carry and Travel Insurance Info
Carry valid passport, return flight tickets, hotel vouchers, and travel insurance for smooth entry. Print visa-free documentation details for reference.

Whether it’s a Mauritius tour package from Bangalore for adventure tour packages, a romantic escape from Chennai, or a cultural retreat from Kolkata—Travelxploria curates your island dreams with care and expertise.
